name: Zombies Rush
description: Zombies Rush is a fast-paced top-down survival shooter that pits a lone survivor against an endless, evolving horde. Built for fluid action, this 2D arcade shooter, turns every escape into a high-stakes dance with death. Tilt and weave through trees to outmaneuver the rush. Each wave brings faster, smarter, and deadlier undead threats. Experience a modern take on the classic zombie survival genre with clean, stylized graphics and kinetic combat.
instructions: Desktop Mouse amp Keyboard Move amp Direct Hold amp Drag Left Click Your character follows the direction of your mouse from their current position Keyboard Use WASD or Arrow Keys for classic directional movement Mobile Touch Touch amp Dra
